reference: I have a few indentations on both sides of my skull, ranging from barely noticeable to quite visible. I was hoping to find out if there is any way I could possibly treat these. I understand it is perfectly normal, but I would prefer to fix it if possible. Any response is appreciated. I am willing to send pictures if that helps.
